title: When to Seek Professional Help
drDigitalIntro: Know when to give up and ask for help. If you've restarted multiple times, updated everything, cleared cache, and nothing works — it's time for support. Apple Stores offer repairs. Call AppleCare. Contact the app developer. Post on forums. Describe the problem clearly: what happened, what did you try, what's the error message. Sometimes you need an expert.
drDigitalSuccess: You know when to ask for help!
drDigitalHint: Describing the problem clearly is key to getting good help.
